title: ZNetwork gates — LAB → SHADOW soak → ACTIVE
required_reviews: Canonical: NewLatest/ZNetwork only — no SG sibling duplicate
znetwork-test-battery.sh passes all smoke + safety tiers
Slide-in plan reviewed — no carrier drop on primary iface
NetworkManager handoff tested in VM with rollback
Field DNS cutover does not break captive portals
DDoS policy limits validated under load test
Gatekeeper IFF path signed off (read-only lab calls)
Handshake sim — truth_gate + belt_sync only, no steady stream
FEC repair sim — repair burst only, thermal backoff verified
Thermal vent sim — cool_sort routes to venting dies
Field stream NOT enabled — field_stream_lab_approved stays false until soak
SHADOW 72h soak on isolated iface before ACTIVE consideration
Windows and macOS backend stubs replaced or waived

sign_off.notes: Fast ACTIVE — lab battery passed; field stream remains locked.
